🇱🇧 MP Farid Al-Boustani:

— Regarding the visit of the American delegation to Lebanon, the visit is serious and delicate. They are demanding actions now, not a plan, and within sixty days.

— After what I heard from the American delegation, I can say that we are being “strangled” militarily and financially.

— There is strict security enforcement, and Hezbollah currently has no presence at the port or the airport. The American delegation has detailed information on all of the party’s funding sources, and they want to shut down Al-Qard Al-Hassan.

— They want to bring Iran into the picture to help succeed the negotiations between us and Israel because of Tehran’s influence over the party, and I do not support a military solution.

— What I received from the American delegation were merely “promises in the air,” and we do not want to build Lebanon at the expense of the poor. We can invest in the gold reserves; we could even lend to other countries over a set period and pay depositors back using the profits.

— The negotiations must include a final solution that allows the people of the South to live in peace.

— The American side is primarily concerned with removing the weapons, that is their top priority. The entire economic track we had been discussing is no longer mentioned unless the weapons are removed.

🔴@haqqintel

🇮🇷 A new stone sculpture inspired by the ancient carvings at Naqsh-e Rostam was revealed today in Tehran, Iran. 

1️⃣ It showed Shapur I of the Sassanid Empire on horseback, with the Roman Emperor Valerian kneeling before him, beneath a large mural reading: “You will kneel again.”

2️⃣ Iran has existed for more than 4,000 years, facing powerful adversaries throughout its history, including the Greeks, Arabs, Mongols, and Romans. The statue depicts the Battle of Edessa in 260 CE, when Shapur captured the Roman Emperor, an event scholars describe as one of Iran’s greatest historic victories and a major humiliation for Rome.

➡️ “This was not just a battle. It was a message,” explained Dr. Sorour Khorashadi, Head of Archaeology at Tarbiat Modares University. Shapur immortalized his victory in stone so that future generations would remember how Eastern strength stopped Western power.

3️⃣ According to Tehran officials, the new statue was created to connect Iranians today with that legacy of resilience. Working with artist Peiman Ghanem, the municipality wanted a public artwork that wouldn’t just decorate a square, but remind citizens that Iran has always stood firm against foreign domination.

♦️Many people at the unveiling felt a deep sense of pride.
History repeats itself
said Hamed, a 17-year-old student:
We struggled against Western powers before, and we still do today. But just like then, I believe we will overcome.

🔴@haqqintel

🇱🇧Lebanese Army:
The Israeli enemy continues its violations, exceeding 4,500 since the cessation of hostilities agreement came into effect, following its last aggression against Lebanon in 2024.
In this context, the Israeli enemy continues its attacks on civilians, most recently targeting a number of southern villages today, in addition to civilians in several populated areas, resulting in deaths and injuries.
This coincides with its persistent violations of Lebanese sovereignty by land, sea, and air, and its ongoing crimes against residents of border villages, including the launching of Molotov cocktails and the demolition of homes.
These attacks and violations hinder the army's deployment in the south, and their continuation will hinder the implementation of its plan, starting from the area south of the Litani River. As part of its ongoing engineering survey operations in the southern regions, a specialized military unit discovered and dismantled a camouflaged spy device that the Israeli enemy had placed in the Labbouneh-Tyre area. This is my will and my final message. If these words reach you, know that israel has succeeded in killing me and silencing my voice.

First, peace, mercy, and blessings of God be upon you.

God knows that I exerted all my effort and strength to be a support and a voice for my people, ever since I opened my eyes to life in the alleys and streets of Jabalia refugee camp. My hope was that God would grant me life to return with my family and loved ones to our original town of Asqalan, occupied al-Majdal, but God’s will was swifter, and His judgment prevailed.

I lived pain in all its details and tasted grief and loss many times. Yet I never hesitated to convey the truth as it is, without distortion or falsification, hoping that God would witness those who remained silent, those who accepted our killing, those who besieged our breaths, and whose hearts were not moved by the torn bodies of our children and women, and who did not stop the massacre that our people have been subjected to for more than a year and a half.

I entrust you with Palestine, the jewel of the crown of Muslims and the heartbeat of every free person in this world.
I entrust you with its people and its oppressed little children, who were not given the chance to dream or live in safety and peace.
Their pure bodies were crushed by thousands of tons of israeli bombs and missiles; they were torn apart, and their limbs scattered on the walls.

I advise you not to let chains silence you, nor let borders hold you back. Be bridges toward liberating the land and the people, until the sun of dignity and freedom rises over our stolen land.

I entrust you with my family in the best way. I entrust you with the apple of my eye, my beloved daughter Sham, whom time did not allow me to see grow as I dreamed.

I entrust you with my dear son Salah, whom I wished to be a support and companion on the path until he grows strong and carries my burdens and continues the message.

I entrust you with my beloved mother, whose prayers were the reason I reached where I did, and whose prayers were my fortress and her light was my path.
I pray to God to ease her heart and reward her with the best recompense.

I also entrust you with my lifelong companion, my beloved wife Umm Salah Bayan, whom war separated from me for many long days and months. Yet she remained faithful, steadfast like an olive tree trunk that does not bend, patient and hopeful, carrying the trust in my absence with all strength and faith.

I advise you to gather around them and be their support after God Almighty.

If I die, I die firm on my principle, and I testify to God that I am content with His judgment, believing in meeting Him, certain that what is with God is better and everlasting.

O God, accept me among the martyrs, forgive me for my past and future sins, and make my blood a light that illuminates the path of freedom for my people and family.

Forgive me if I have fallen short, and pray for mercy for me, for I have remained true to the covenant and have not changed or altered.

Do not forget Gaza…
And do not forget me in your good prayers for forgiveness and acceptance.

Anas Jamal Al-Sharif, Palestinian journalist in Gaza
August 10, 2025

🇱🇧Speech of the Head of the Loyalty to the Resistance Bloc, MP Mohammad Raad, at the Ceremony Held by the Iranian Embassy in Beirut on the Occasion of International Quds Day  ⬇️ 

The Head of the Loyalty to the Resistance Bloc, MP Mohammad Raad, affirmed that Al-Quds is not merely a political issue, nor just a dispute over land and borders. Al-Quds is the cause of human liberation in this region and the world. It is the highest expression of the path toward the victory of the oppressed, the downtrodden, and the persecuted—those who reject and resist oppression, arrogance, tyranny, occupation, and aggression in all corners of the world. Al-Quds is not only the capital of Palestine but the capital of the earth and the point of connection with the heavens. Because of its greatness and loftiness, Al-Quds deserves to be the meeting point for believers, the free, and the honorable across the entire world.  

On the "israeli" Aggression on the Southern Suburb:  

The resistance strongly condemns today’s "zionist" aggression on the southern suburb and its people and denounces all its haphazard and fabricated justifications. It reaffirms its commitment to thwart the policies of this enemy and all its attempts to drag Lebanon into normalization with it. Since the resistance bears the responsibility, it calls on the government to strengthen national solidarity against the "zionist" enemy and to take practical steps to ward off dangers, forcing the enemy to withdraw from our occupied land unconditionally and to halt its aggression against Lebanon.  

The resistance, having agreed to the ceasefire declaration, remains committed to it and does not violate it. 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Joint Statement of the Beijing Meeting between China, Russia and Iran

 The Beijing Meeting between China, Russia and Iran was successfully held on March 14, 2025. The Beijing Meeting was chaired by Deputy Foreign Minister Ma Zhaoxu of the People’s Republic of China, with participation of Deputy Foreign Minister Ryabkov Sergey Alexeevich of the Russian Federation and Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi of the Islamic Republic of Iran.

China, Russia and Iran engaged in in-depth discussions on the latest state of play with regard to nuclear issue and sanctions lifting. The three countries emphasized on the necessity of terminating all unlawful unilateral sanctions.

The three countries reiterated that political and diplomatic engagement and dialogue based on the principle of mutual respect remains the only viable and practical option in this regard.

The three countries emphasized that relevant parties should be committed to addressing the root cause of the current situation and abandoning sanction, pressure, or threat of force. 

The three countries stressed the importance of the UNSC Resolution 2231, including its timeframes, and called for relevant parties to refrain from any action that may escalate the situation, so as to create a favourable atmosphere and conditions for diplomatic efforts.

The three countries reiterated the importance of upholding the Treaty on the Non-proliferation of Nuclear Weapons (NPT) as the cornerstone of international non-proliferation regime. China and Russia welcomed Iran’s reiteration that its nuclear programme is exclusively for peaceful purposes and not for development of nuclear weapons, and also welcomed Iran’s  commitment to full compliance with its obligations under the NPT and Comprehensive Safeguard Agreement, supported Iran’s policy to continue cooperation with the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA), and stressed the need to fully respect Iran’s right to peaceful uses of nuclear energy as a State Party to the NPT. The three countries stressed the necessity for all States to refrain from any action that undermines the technical, objective and impartial work of the IAEA.

Iran and Russia commended China for its constructive role and hosting the Beijing meeting. The three countries agreed to continue their close consultation and cooperation in the future.

The three countries also exchanged views on regional and international issues of common interest, and agreed to maintain and strengthen their coordination in international organizations and multilateral arrangements such as BRICS and Shanghai Cooperation Organization.

🇸🇾 Statement by the Popular Resistance in Syria 

Statement Issued by the Media Office of the Syrian Popular Resistance

The Syrian Popular Resistance strongly condemns the misleading and inciting statements broadcast by Al Jazeera Qatar, which aim to distort facts and justify the crimes committed by the terrorist gangs of Hay’at Tahrir al-Sham against the Syrian people. This comes as part of the biased media approach that has long supported terrorism, a pattern that this channel has maintained for years.

First: Media Misrepresentation of the Nature of the Resistance

Al Jazeera’s attempt to portray the Syrian Popular Resistance as a sectarian group seeking to ignite a civil war is nothing but blatant misinformation intended to distort the truth. The resistance comprises various segments of Syrian society, including villagers and townspeople who have risen to defend themselves and their families against terrorist gangs that have shed the innocent blood of their own people.

Second: Systematic Sectarian Incitement

The claim made in the channel’s report that the Syrian Popular Resistance engages in “sectarian killings” is a blatant lie with no basis in reality. The resistance exclusively targets armed terrorist organizations, primarily Hay’at Tahrir al-Sham, which has committed horrific massacres against civilians from all sects, including our Sunni brethren—who were the first victims of its Takfiri terrorism—along with Christians, Shia, Alawites, and others. The resistance has never been, and will never be, part of any sectarian conflict; rather, it is a national struggle to defend the land and dignity of the people against occupation and its Takfiri agents.

Third: Justifying Oppression and Terrorism in the Name of the So-Called “Government”

Al Jazeera’s portrayal of the so-called “government” of Abu Mohammad al-Jolani, a well-known agent, as having “successfully managed affairs” is nothing but a deliberate whitewashing of a terrorist regime built on oppression, torture, assassinations, and murder, serving as a mere tool in the hands of occupation forces and intelligence agencies. Additionally, the channel’s discussion of the “need for the government to respond without alienating Alawites” is nothing short of an open call to continue massacring civilians under the guise of fighting the resistance.

Fourth: Double Standards and Blatant Bias Toward Terrorism

Al Jazeera has long served as a propaganda platform for Takfiri groups, promoting their narratives while concealing their crimes against the Syrian people. While the channel ignores the massacres committed by terrorists against civilians, it is quick to smear any legitimate resistance against them. This blatant double standard exposes Al Jazeera’s suspicious agenda and its full alignment with terrorism.

Conclusion

The factions of the Syrian Popular Resistance affirm their unwavering commitment to defeating terrorism. These deceptive media campaigns will neither weaken our resolve nor change the reality of the battle that Syrians are fighting against extremist gangs to protect their families, children, and women. We also call upon our people to remain vigilant against these suspicious campaigns, whose sole purpose is to spread discord and legitimize the rule of terrorists over our land.

Syrian Popular Resistance Media Office
March 8, 2025

🇱🇧🇮🇷Statement Issued by Hezbollah on the 46th Anniversary of the Victory of the Islamic Revolution in Iran ⬇️ 

In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

Hezbollah extends its warmest congratulations and blessings to Imam Sayyed Ali Khamenei (may his shadow remain extended), Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, and the Iranian people on the 46th anniversary of the blessed victory of the Islamic Revolution. This revolution, led by the late Imam Ruhollah Al-Mousawi Al-Khomeini (رض), changed the course of events, reshaped history, overthrew the system of tyranny and despotism, and laid the foundations of a strong and independent Islamic state that does not submit to the dominance of global powers but instead relies on the will of its people and its humanitarian and religious principles.

With its wise leadership, this revolution was able to guide this great nation toward building a powerful and exemplary state in political independence, scientific advancement, and industrial progress across various fields—despite all forms of sieges, aggression, and conspiracies targeting it. Today, after more than four decades, the Islamic Republic has become a firmly established regional power, securing its position on the international stage and affirming its role as a fundamental pillar in regional and global equations.

Since its inception, the Islamic Republic of Iran has been a stronghold for just causes in the region, always standing by oppressed nations and serving as a true supporter of resistance movements. It has been a primary backer of the Palestinian cause, which faces ongoing attempts at erasure by imperialist forces—especially under the new U.S. administration, which seeks to impose liquidation projects and erase Palestine from the consciousness and conscience of the Ummah.

The Islamic Republic has been a key partner in every victory achieved by the resistance movements, particularly in Lebanon, where it has supported them since their inception in 1982. It has provided all forms of assistance to enable them to liberate the land and expel the occupiers. This support has played a major role in achieving victories and changing the balance of power in the region.

As Hezbollah, we express our wishes for the Islamic Republic—under the leadership of Imam Sayyed Ali Khamenei (ح)—to achieve greater strength, progress, resilience, and stability. We reaffirm that the principles upon which the revolution was founded—foremost among them the rejection of subjugation to imperialist forces, the commitment to liberating Palestine, and the promotion of Islamic unity—remain the guarantee for the future of this Ummah.

Monday, February 10, 2025
11 Sha’ban 1446 AH

📚 New edition of our book — all type-os finally ironed out

As I was reading aloud my book to my baby daughter, I cringed at how many type-os and mistakes I missed.

Each chapter, I would find many, fix them, then upload the updated manuscript into our print-on-demand service (which they charged money for every time since the book was on their listing for longer than two months). So I decided to stop uploading corrected manuscripts after each chapter, and poured through the entire book from front to back until I got every type-o.

For those who bought prior editions, there is no worry, they are not super major errors that would warrant you needing to buy it again, we just want to  make sure we adhere to quality standards for future orders.

Our book is available here and ships worldwide. https://basirapress.org/shop/books/firmest-handle-book/

📹A video is currently circulating featuring a Hamas representative in Turkey, Talal Nasser (whom we never heard of), claiming that the resistance supports Mossad agents in Syria and opposes Bashar al-Assad. 

🔎 Here’s why this claim should be critically evaluated:

1️⃣ Historical Context: While Hamas and Syria have had conflicts in the past—most notably during the conflicts  in 2011, when Hamas supported rebel groups—Iran temporarily reduced its funding for Hamas due to this stance. However, relations between Hamas and Syria were later reconciled, with both reaffirming their shared goal of removing the Israeli occupation.

2️⃣ Source of Authority: A representative like Talal Nasser, based in Turkey and largely unknown to many Palestinians, cannot speak authoritatively on Hamas’s stance. The official positions of Hamas come from high-ranking leaders such as Abu Obeida, Osama Hamdan, or  Shaheed Yahya Sinwar. Sinwar, in particular, supported the removal of Mossad agents in Syria and backed Bashar al-Assad. Hamdan, too, holds a similar position.

3️⃣ Official Statements: To understand Hamas’s official position, one must refer to the movement’s communiqués or statements from its top leadership. The most recent public declaration on Syria came in 2024 from Osama Hamdan, a well-respected and prominent figure within Hamas, supporting Syria. 

4️⃣ The Political Wings: Hamas’s political and military wings have historically exhibited differing stances toward the Syrian government. The military wing has generally maintained a pro-Assad position, while the political wing’s support has varied. However, Shaheed Yahya Sinwar was in support of both. 

5️⃣ Disseminating videos featuring representatives like Talal Nasser, who opposes Bashar al-Assad, can create fire between Hamas and Syria. It’s important to recognize that both entities have previously experienced conflicts but have since reconciled. For instance, Ismail Haniyeh, initially critical of Syria, later retracted his statements to support Assad and opposed the “rebels.”

🇱🇧 Statement Issued by Hezbollah on the Anniversary of Al-Aqsa Flood:

Today marks the one-year anniversary of the heroic Al-Aqsa Flood operation, which highlighted the determination of the Palestinian resistance in standing against the aggression, injustice, and occupation that has oppressed the Palestinian people since 1948, along with the wars, tragedies, and destruction that followed.

This operation will have profound historical and strategic consequences for the region, continuing until justice is achieved and the occupation is removed, allowing the Palestinian people to reclaim their legitimate rights to their land, from the river to the sea.

On this historic occasion, we emphasize the following:

 1. The Palestinian people have the full right to resist the occupation by any means necessary to restore their legitimate rights and eliminate the occupation.

 2. Despite the brutality of the occupation and its aggression, which has resulted in the martyrdom of tens of thousands of Palestinians and unprecedented destruction in Gaza, this unjust and aggressive entity has proven fragile, unable to survive without American support.

 3. There is no place for this temporary zionist entity in our region or within our social, cultural, and human fabric. It remains a malignant, aggressive tumor that must be removed, no matter how long it takes.

 4. The United States, along with its global and regional allies and tools, are complicit in this occupation’s aggression and crimes against the Palestinian, Lebanese, and regional peoples. They bear full responsibility for the killing, injustice, and horrific humanitarian tragedies.

 5. We commend the steadfastness of the Palestinian people and their valiant resistance over the past year, despite the tragedies and suffering they have endured. Their patience, endurance, and heroism make them deserving of victory.

 6. We praise the courage and strength of our brothers, the fighters on the support fronts in Yemen and Iraq, as well as the historic decision by the Islamic Republic of Iran to strike deep into the heart of the occupying entity with missiles in support of the Palestinian and Lebanese people. This decision has had significant effects on the nature of the ongoing confrontation with the zionist enemy.

 7. Hezbollah’s decision to open the support front on October 8, in solidarity with the Palestinian people and their honorable resistance, is a stance for justice and humanity. It is also a decision to defend Lebanon and its people, for which our resistance and our people have paid a heavy price—both in leadership, military, and material resources, and through the forced displacement of hundreds of thousands of civilians and the widespread destruction of property. The enemy continues its crimes and aggression without restraint, but we are confident, with Allah’s will, in our resistance’s ability to repel this aggression. We believe in our people’s strength to endure until this hardship is lifted. After difficulty comes ease, and after distress comes relief. The era of defeats is over, and Allah’s victory has arrived.

♦️The word jihad comes from the Arabic term al-jihad, meaning "struggle." It has various meanings, including:

1️⃣ Jihad refers to fighting in accordance with Islamic law.

2️⃣ Jihad is the effort to exalt the religion of Allah or to keep the faith alive.

3️⃣ Jihad represents a serious effort to achieve the good of humanity as a whole.

4️⃣ Jihad is the pursuit of religious knowledge.

It can be divided into four levels ⬇️

1️⃣ Jihad an-nafs, or the struggle against oneself.

2️⃣ Jihad ash-shayatin, or the struggle against Satan.

3️⃣ Jihad al-kuffar wal-munafiqin, or the struggle against disbelievers and hypocrites.

4️⃣ Jihad arbaab azh-zhulmi wal-bida’ wal-munkaroot, or the struggle against figures of tyranny, heresy, and evil.

💛🌹 A brief biography about the great commander Sayyed Fouad Ali Shokr "Sayyed Mohsen" ⬇️

1️⃣ Place and Date of Birth: Nabi Chit, April 25, 1961.  

2️⃣ He was from the founding generation of Hezbollah and played a leading role in establishing and organizing the initial groups of the Islamic Resistance in Lebanon.  

3️⃣ He participated in resisting the Israeli invasion in the early 1980s and was injured in the heroic confrontation at Khaldeh in 1982.  

4️⃣ He played a crucial role in planning and managing operations, especially significant ones, against the Israeli occupation forces in Lebanon.  

5️⃣ He is the primary central military leader of Hezbollah during its foundational period and the first half of the 1990s.  

6️⃣ He organized the dispatch of Hezbollah military cadres to support oppressed Muslims in Bosnia and Herzegovina between 1992 and 1995.  

7️⃣ He was responsible for devising military plans for the Islamic Resistance, particularly during and after the July 2006 war, both on the eastern front against extremist groups and the southern front against the Israeli enemy.  

8️⃣ He led various significant military and security missions during different stages of the resistance's history.  

9️⃣ He served on Hezbollah's central council during periods of his fighting career and was a member of the Fight Council of the Islamic Resistance since its establishment.  

🔟 He led military operations on the Lebanese support front since the beginning of Battle Al-Aqsa Flood.  

1️⃣1️⃣ He became a martyr on the path to liberating Al-Quds following an Israeli assassination operation on July 30, 2024, in the southern suburb of Beirut.

In the Name of God, the Compassionate, the Merciful

Dear university students in the United States of America, this message is an expression of our empathy and solidarity with you. As the page of history is turning, you are standing on the right side of it.

The goal of this struggle is to put an end to the blatant oppression that the brutal Zionist terrorist network has inflicted on the Palestinian nation for many years. After seizing their country, the Zionist regime has subjected them to the harshest of pressures and tortures.

The apartheid Zionist regime's genocide today is the continuation of extreme oppressive behavior which has been going on for decades. Palestine is an independent land with a long history. It is a nation comprised of Muslims, Christians, and Jews.  

After the World War, the capitalist Zionist network gradually imported several thousand terrorists into this land with the help of the British government. These terrorists attacked cities and villages, murdered tens of thousands of people and pushed out multitudes into neighboring countries. They seized their homes, businesses and farmlands, formed a government in the usurped land of Palestine and called it israel.

After England's initial help, the United States became the greatest supporter of this usurper regime, ceaselessly providing it with political, economic and military support. In an act of unforgivable recklessness, the United States even opened the way and provided assistance for the regime's production of nuclear weapons.

The Zionist regime used an iron-fist policy against the defenseless people of Palestine from the very beginning and has, day by day, intensified its brutality, terror and repression in complete disregard of all moral, human and religious values.

The United States government and its allies refused to even frown upon this state terrorism and ongoing oppression. And today, some remarks by the US government regarding the horrific crimes taking place in Gaza are more hypocritical than real.

🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General, His Eminence Sayyid Hassan Nasrallah (ح) conveys his condolences to Sayyid Ali Khamenei (ح) on the martyrdom of Sayyed Raisi and his companions ⬇️ 

In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

On the side of His Eminence, Grand Ayatollah Leader Imam Sayyed Ali Khamenei (may his shadow endure)

May God’s peace, mercy, and blessings be upon you

On behalf of Hezbollah, its Mujahideen, the families of its martyrs and its wounded, and the general public of the resistance in Lebanon, I extend to you my deepest condolences and feelings of sympathy on the occasion of the martyrdom of this group of righteous leaders, led by His Eminence Ayatollah Sayyid Ibrahim Raisi, the Mujahid, servant and loyal President of the Islamic Republic, and his Minister of Foreign Affairs, the dear brother Dr. Hussein Amirabdullahian, the bearer of the banner of defending the resistance in all international forums, His Eminence Ayatollah Al Hashem, your representative in East Azerbaijan, its governor, Mr. Rahmati, and their comrades who were with them.

We share with you all the feelings and meanings of the loss of these honourable leaders at this sensitive stage as you lead the Islamic nation in its bitter struggle with the forces of arrogance and hegemony and the American and Zionist occupation of our sanctities, our countries, and our peoples.

We and all the oppressed, the resistors, and the fighters on the path of truth have all the consolation and hope of your blessed presence and your wise, direct, and courageous leadership.

I ask God Almighty to extend your honourable life and to help your pure heart bear the pain of this loss of these loyal and sincere leaders and to grant their honourable and honourable families, our dear and great Iranian people, and all respected officials of the Islamic Republic patience and solace, great reward, and near joy and victory. May God bless all of these good martyrs with His vast mercy and gather them with our masters, the Messenger of God and his pure family, may God’s prayers be upon them all.

[Sayyid] Hassan Nasrallah
Monday 11 Dhul-Qi’dah 1445 AH
Corresponding to: 5/20/2024 AD

🇵🇸 Statement by the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine regarding the death of the Iranian President, Foreign Minister, and their companions ⬇️

The Popular Front mourns Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi and his companions and affirms its confidence that Iran will overcome this ordeal.

With hearts filled with pain and sorrow, the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine received the news of the passing of Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi, Foreign Minister Hossein Amir Abdollahian, and other officials due to the crash of a helicopter carrying them in East Azerbaijan Province in northwestern Iran Sunday evening.

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, on behalf of its Secretary-General, his deputy, all its members, and the entire Palestinian people, extends its deepest condolences to the Iranian people and their leadership for this great loss and tragic accident.

The Popular Front commends the late Iranian president, affirming that he dedicated his life to serving his country and working throughout his years in office to advance the Islamic Republic on all levels, contributing to its transformation into a significant and influential regional power.

He also made significant efforts in supporting the Palestinian cause and the Palestinian resistance, particularly in the Al-Aqsa Flood battle. 

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine expresses its full solidarity and support with the Iranian people and their leadership, confident that the Islamic Republic of Iran will overcome this ordeal and fill the substantial void left by the president and the other officials, for Iran has the constitution and leadership to compensate for this significant loss.

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine 
Central Media Department 
May 20, 2024

In the Name of God, the Compassionate, the Merciful

Surely we belong to God and to Him we shall return

With deep sorrow and regret, I have received the bitter news of the martyrdom-like demise of the mujahid scholar, the people's President, the competent, hard-working servant of Imam Reza (pbuh), Hujjat al-Islam wal-Muslimeen, Haj Sayyid Ebrahim Raisi and his esteemed entourage (may God be pleased with them). The entire period that this great, self-sacrificing person held various responsibilities, both during his brief presidency and before that, he was totally dedicated to serving the people, the country, and Islam nonstop.

Our honorable Raisi worked tirelessly. In this bitter tragedy, the Iranian nation lost a devoted, sincere, valuable individual who served their country. For him, the well-being and satisfaction of the people, which he considered to be a reflection of divine approval, took precedence over everything else. Therefore, the hurt he suffered due to the ingratitude and taunts of some ill-wishers did not deter him from his round-the-clock efforts for progress and to improve matters.

I hereby declare five days of public mourning and offer my condolences to the dear Iranian nation.

According to Article 131 of the [Iranian] Constitution, Mr. Mokhber will assume the position of head of the Executive Branch and is obliged to cooperate with the heads of the Legislative and Judicial Branches in facilitating the election of a new president within a period that is not to exceed 50 days. Finally, I extend my heartfelt condolences to the honorable mother of Mr. Raisi, his virtuous, noble wife, the other bereaved family members of the President, and the honorable families of his entourage, in particular the honorable father of Mr. Ale-Hashem. I pray for their patience and solace, and pray for God’s mercy for the departed souls.

Sayyid Ali Khamenei
May 20, 2024

In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful 

"Who, when disaster strikes them, say, 'Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return. Those are the ones upon whom are blessings from their Lord and mercy. And it is those who are the [rightly] guided.'" 

Allah Almighty is Truthful 

On the occasion of the tragic incident that led to the martyrdom of His Eminence Ayatollah Sayyid Ebrahim Raisi, President of the Islamic Republic of Iran, the martyrdom of our dear brother Dr. Hossein Amir-Abdollahian, Foreign Minister of the Islamic Republic, and the representative of His Eminence Imam Khamenei in the province of Azerbaijan, Ayatollah Sayyid Mohammad Ali Al-Hashem, and the other esteemed brothers, Hezbollah in Lebanon extends its deepest condolences and sympathy for their loss. 

We offer our condolences first to our Master, the Remainder Proof of Allah on His land, the master of Era and Time, Imam Al-Mahdi (peace be upon him), to His Eminence Ayatollah Imam Sayyid Ali Khamenei (may his shadow endure), to our great religious scholars, the officials of the Islamic Republic, the patient and dear Iranian people, especially their noble and struggling families, as well as to Muslims and the free people of the world. 

We have known the martyred president closely for a long time; he was to us a great brother, a strong supporter, and a steadfast defender of our causes and the causes of the Ummah [nation], foremost among them being Al-Quds and Palestine. He was a protector of the resistance movements and their fighters in all the positions he held. He was also a sincere and honest servant to the dear people of Iran and the lofty Islamic Republic, a loyal ally to His Eminence Imam Khamenei (may his shadow endure), and a great hope for all the oppressed and downtrodden. 

Similarly, the dear martyred brother Dr. Hossein Amir-Abdollahian, in all his positions of responsibility, the latest being the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, was an active, dedicated, and sacrificial minister, a bearer of the flag in all political and diplomatic forums around the world, a lover of resistance movements, and devoted to supporting and aiding them.

“For us to simply classify the Nakba as a single historical event, would be an incorrect framing, as the collection of atrocities visited on the Palestinian people by the Zionist regime represents an ongoing attempt to solidify the dominance of "Israel’s" settler-colonial project.”

♦️The Nakba, or ethnic cleansing of Palestine, is often defined as a historical event in which over half of Palestine’s villages, towns, and cities were destroyed, and 450 towns and villages were depopulated of their Palestinian inhabitants, amounting to the forced displacement of around 800,000 people. 

➡️ The word Nakba means “catastrophe,” which refers to that time. When we speak of al-Nakba in English, we are using a term that refers to a historical event often understood as the ethnic cleansing of Palestine.

♦️To classify the Nakba as a single historical event is an incorrect framing, as the collection of atrocities visited on the Palestinian people by the Zionist regime represents an ongoing attempt to solidify the dominance of "Israel’s" settler-colonial project. To say that the ethnic cleansing of Palestine took place only around 1948 is, in a way, acquiescing to the Zionist concept that their “State” model won and that the Palestinians have already been defeated. 

♦️While naming one single event as The Nakba is correct, isolating the concept of the ethnic cleansing of Palestine to atrocities visited on Palestinians solely during 1948 paints an incomplete picture of the true situation.

➡️ Many of the same legal concepts, language, arguments, and tactics used to ethnically cleanse Palestine in 1947 are being used today to achieve the same goal, and the examples of this are clear for all to see. This is an ongoing battle, one of a people—the Palestinians—fighting to expel an invading and occupying usurper entity—the Zionist regime.

Dear Comrades, Dear Friends,

These days, many are celebrating Palestinian Prisoners' Day through initiatives similar to yours, commemorating the martyrdom of Walid Daqqah. This symbolic figure from the icons of the Palestinian resistance who never surrendered or faltered in any way throughout decades of captivity, defying torture, deprivation, isolation, and illness, in addition to the banning of his messages and writings.

Last year, on this very occasion, Walid was still steadfast in his solitary cell; his will unshakable, despite being deprived of all necessary medical care. Some of you still remember various expressions of solid support for him and other fighters detained in zionist prisons, particularly the calls and invitations to support him, especially the ongoing militant initiatives at that time, aiming to extricate Comrade Walid, whose health situation was dire, from the clutches of his criminal jailers. Unfortunately, all our efforts were not enough to overcome the stubbornness of Ben-Gvir and their accomplices among the jailers and judges. Death by denial of medical care is now the master of the situation in various zionist prisons, especially the Naqab prison where the abductees of Gaza are held.

It might be useful to remind ourselves, dear comrades, that if the Palestinian National Council had designated April 17th as "Palestinian Prisoners' Day" in 1974, it was not only to denounce the barbarity of the zionist occupier on this occasion, nor just to honor the captive resistance fighters by reminding the popular masses of their sacrifices and concessions or their unshakable will in facing the zionist military. Celebrating Prisoners' Day aims above all to affirm loudly and clearly our duties towards our imprisoned comrades, and foremost among all, to include their liberation in the general dynamics of our ongoing struggles. Celebrating Palestinian Prisoners' Day aims above all, dear comrades, to call and encourage the living forces of the revolution and its fighting vanguards to implement all necessary measures to practically express our firm resolve to liberate our comrades from the clutches of their criminal jailers.

Our Walid died standing. He remains forever alive in our hearts and in the minds of the masses and fighters participating in this epic of resistance, and he remains forever alive with all those who preceded him or followed him as torches lighting the way of resistance, liberation, freedom, and emancipation.

♦️Created in the 90s by Iran, the Falaq-1 missile is a 240mm unguided spin-stabilized rocket. The rocket's warhead is 50kg and has a range of 10,000m at speeds of up to 450 m/s

♦️ The missile system is similar to the Russian/Soviet 240 mm (12-round) BM-24 system based on a ZIL-157 (6 × 6)

♦️ Falaq-1 has been observed in Syria in the hands of multiple groups. sources say that Syria domestically produced copies of the Falaq-1, and non-standard rockets have been documented being used with some of these systems

As we bid farewell to the martyr Walid Daqqa, who spent 38 years in detention, we call on the concerned international authorities to bring those responsible for Daqqa’s martyrdom to the international court and to bring the criminals accountable and punished.

A little information about the Elbit Systems’ Hermes 900 ⬇️ 

♦️ The Hermes 900 is a medium-size, multi-payload, medium-altitude long-endurance (MALE) unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV). It is the successor to the Hermes 450 which Hezbollah has previously succeeded in neutralizing. 

♦️ The UAVs first flight occurred on 9 December, 2009 and was introcudec publicly in 2012. The IOF first used the drone in combat during the 2014 war on Gaza. 

♦️ Takeoff weight: 1,180Kg (more than double the weight of the Hermes 450), Max payload: 350Kg (including standard and long-range electro-optical/infrared, synthetic aperture radar/ground-moving target indication, communications and electronic intelligence, electronic warfare, and hyperspectral sensors, enabling the UAV to achieve persistent wide-area surveillance.), Endurance up to 36 hours, Service ceiling 30,000ft (9144m),  • Maximum speed: 220 km/h (140 mph, 120 kn)Cruise speed: 112 km/h (70 mph, 60 kn), operational rage of over 1,000km

♦️ Elbit Systems said that the Hermes 900 had the “first ever dual military and civilian certifications for a UAS, can also perform ground support and maritime patrol missions for both naval customers and civilian government agencies.”

♦️ Per Janes: the Hermes 900 ranges in price between $5.83 million USD and $6.85 million USD per unit.
